programme.title: Dangerous Attraction
programme.desc: Amanda Righetti stars as a woman battling to stop living in fear after a co-worker develops a dangerous obsession with her. (2012)

programme.title: The Killer Trainer
programme.desc: A woman must defend herself after her personal trainer takes their relationship to dangerous levels. Starring Hannah Barefoot (2018)

programme.title: Stash House
programme.desc: A couple love their new house, bought for a steal out of a foreclosure. During their first visit they find illegal drugs stashed in the walls, and they realise this is not their dream house. As they are about to leave, suddenly their exit is blocked by a gun-wielding neighbour and his accomplice. They come to realise the house is hiding more than drugs - it's the operation centre for mass drug tsar who is buried beneath the floorboards. On the run from the professional killers who want the drugs and evidence, the resourceful couple will need to turn the tables on their attackers to survive.

programme.title: The Experiment
programme.desc: 26 men are chosen to participate in a psychological study that ultimately spirals out of control

programme.title: Anarchy
programme.desc: A gritty story of a take-no-prisoners war between dirty cops and an outlaw biker gang. A drug kingpin is driven to desperate measures.

programme.title: World Nature Heritage

programme.title: Chocolate Covered
programme.desc: Today we're travelling to the Napa Valley in California taking Claire back to The French Laundry (3 Michelin Starred) where Claire was head pastry chef for 5 years (until 2009). We meet chef Thomas Keller and have a look behind the scenes of his world-famous restaurant and take a tour of The French Laundry's culinary gardens where produce is grown for TFL. New head of pastry, Courtney, is making a fabulous chocolate dessert with Claire which inspires Claire's S'Mores dessert which she makes in the studio. Claire will also show us how to make an amazing chocolate and strawberry shortcake.

programme.title: Cat's Meow
programme.desc: Story of the Hollywood murder that occurred at a star-studded gathering aboard William Randolph Hearst's yacht

programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned, but bizarre things happen several years after his rebirth.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog fight for survival after their plane crashes in the wilderness.

programme.title: Penelope
programme.desc: Born with a snout, Penelope must find true love to break the curse. But she just wants to see the world.

programme.title: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Charlotte's taking her chance in the big city. She just began working for the hottest romance site writing their hit weekly dating article, and her new best friend, Lila, is as fun as she is loyal. She also befriends a coffee barista, Liam, who shows her all the best spots in the city. But dating a new guy each week to write about is making her feel burned out. And when Liam develops feelings for her, Charlotte will need to decide whether her work is more important than her chance at love.

programme.title: Changing Hearts
programme.desc: James Reed is quite content with the successful life he's built for himself, complete with beautiful girlfriend and great reputation in his big city career. After receiving an urgent call about his father's health, James reluctantly returns home to help with the family B&B business. James must learn about sacrificing for the ones he loves, even at the expense of his own dreams.

programme.title: All For Love
programme.desc: Jaded romance novelist Jo Payden has a tight deadline for her latest novel. Her last novel wasn't a big success so when her editor Diana recommends teaming up Colin, a Navy SEAL who also happens to be her brother, she jumps at the opportunity. Jo's enthusiasm quickly turns to dread as she realizes that Colin has signed her up for his Navy SEAL training Boot Camp.

programme.title: You're So Cupid
programme.desc: Fraternal twin sisters Emma and Lilly are as different as night and day but both have an insatiable desire to play matchmaker. Why? Because their father is actually Cupid! Life gets complicated when they discover they're in love with the same guy and they become bitter rivals as they try to win his affection. But can Emma and Lily overcome their problems and use their matchmaking skills to bring their divorcing parents back together?

programme.title: Django... Adios!
programme.desc: Django, a former federal sheriff, is arrested for allegedly stealing a chest full of dollars that was earmarked for the construction of a school and church in Silver City.

programme.title: Raise Your Hands, Dead Man, You're Under Arrest
programme.desc: The sole survivor, named Sando Kid (Peter Lee Lawrence), of a massacre in the North seeks revenge. After suffering the atrocity, the Kid executes a solo revenge, razes, beats and kills everyone involved in the massacre.

programme.title: A Coffin from Sartana
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal massacre, the legendary hero Sartana is ready to do some investigating. Almost everyone in the tiny town of Indian Creek seems eager to buy up the property left behind by the murder victims, ...

programme.title: Deadly Trackers
programme.desc: Jeff sets out to murder each one of the five outlaws who robbed, raped and killed his poor sister.

programme.title: Payment in Blood
programme.desc: In 1867 Texas, after the Civil War, Colonel Thomas Blake and his men refuse to surrender, raiding Yankee towns. Rumors swirl that Blake kills for pleasure, not the Confederacy, leading to large bounties for his capture. However, Blake seeks $200,000 that vanished during the war from Confederate coffers. He sends Chamaco Gonzales to track down the missing fortune, hidden in General Beauregard's strong box.

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: The poaching of rhinos for their horn has brought these animals to the brink of extinction. Namibia's black rhinos are hard to find. The Save The Rhino Trust has been fighting for the protection of the pachyderms every day for 30 years under the most adverse conditions

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The rains have finally arrived in the Kalahari and the vast desert has never looked better. Cleo, the boss of this small group of wild meerkats has given birth to five new pups

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: In another cruel twist Cleo's young pup Ophelia got left behind on a foraging trip and was killed by one of the Kalahari's most dangerous creatures, a Goshawk. The remaining three pups: Zeus, Daisy and Flo have lost their dear sister and playmate and this is causing high levels of insecurity.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live.In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff. This has resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: Recently Priscilla bought an adopted boy pup from a rival gang to the Gosa Burrow. Unfortunately his acceptance into the Gosa group was far from ideal. His life did not get any easier after this

programme.title: Endangered with Michaela Strachan
programme.desc: Seeks to find the rare and endangered species of South Africa and establish what we need to do to conserve them. Documenting and recording the status of our endangered species by region.

programme.title: Endangered with Michaela Strachan
programme.desc: Seeks to find the rare and endangered species of South Africa and establish what we need to do to conserve them. Documenting and recording the status of our endangered species by region.

programme.desc: Seeks to find the rare and endangered species of South Africa and establish what we need to do to conserve them. Documenting and recording the status of our endangered species by region.

programme.title: Endangered with Michaela Strachan
programme.desc: Seeks to find the rare and endangered species of South Africa and establish what we need to do to conserve them. Documenting and recording the status of our endangered species by region.

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: As soon as she arrives, conservationist Hannah Emde immerses herself in Namibia's wildlife. The first destination of her trip is the world-famous Naankuse Foundation near Windhoek

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: Hannah runs a health check on two female cheetahs with veterinarian Maaike. She then goes into the wilderness with Naankuse founder Marlice. Together they go in search of the elephant Apollo, which was resettled in the sanctuary. The former "problem" elephant now leads a peaceful life here.

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: Hannah Emde meets one of Africa's most experienced elephant trackers: Hendrick Munembome, the Director of Elephant Human Relations Aid (EHRA).

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: Hannah Emde meets one of Africa's most experienced elephant trackers: Hendrick Munembome, the Director of Elephant Human Relations Aid (EHRA).

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: The poaching of rhinos for their horn has brought these animals to the brink of extinction. Namibia's black rhinos are hard to find. The Save The Rhino Trust has been fighting for the protection of the pachyderms every day for 30 years under the most adverse conditions

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo's lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

programme.title: Hoanib
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Desert Elephants
programme.desc: The Namib, one of the most hostile deserts on Earth. Without a firm survival strategy, no living soul will make it here. Yet, surprisingly, some species have adapted their lifestyles to these extreme conditions: chameleons, beetles, snakes and mammals are all at home here. The film follows a family of desert elephants that has also adapted to this habitat.

programme.title: Namibia`s Desert Kingdom
programme.desc: Although the dunes are barren, the dry riverbeds show signs of growth. And out of the heat, vast shapes appear. A herd of desert elephants ambles along the dry riverbed sniffing the ground with their lazy trunks. These remarkable creatures can smell the water underground and know where to find it. An abandoned well attracts a troop of chacma baboons, followed by a small herd of oryx and springbok, and finally a group of jackals. None of them has seen the pride of desert lions lying in wait.

programme.title: The Incredible Five
programme.desc: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah. Few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes. But on occasion, the predatory cats reveal their surprisingly different side. In the Northern Serengeti, a group of male cheetahs emerges and turns all we know about them upside down. Males are usually loners or live in small groups, but here we have five tomcats hunting together as one. It is actually, the largest alliance of the animals ever seen! This film has many stories to tell about the sleek hunters.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We follow the rescue of a baby elephant. Once rescued, it will be transported by plane to the breeding station and raised with love and commitment. In order to satisfy the little pachyderm's urge to move while in the breeding station, there is sometimes an adorable football match between the animals. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We accompany the first steps of a two-year-old elephant who is just starting his release program. We also observe the story of two young elephants in their first night in the wilderness on their own. Captivating film footage allows us to truly learn how elephants behave in the wild. (S1 E02)

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Foods that Flow
programme.desc: Looking for ways to have a meal in a cup, Avery visits the Gimme A Squeeze Juice Bar to make fruit smoothies. Lily tries her hand at goat milking at a goat dairy farm. Back in the kitchen, Matt demonstrates how to taste two delicious soups in the same bowl.

programme.title: The Broken Wheel
programme.desc: But now the wheel won't spin, and Sid wonders how exactly wheels work? At school, Sid explores how wheels are simple machines that help move all kinds of things like cars, trains, tricycles, and even toy trucks!

programme.title: My Slide
programme.desc: Sid and his friends explore how inclined planes are simple machines that make it much easier to push up heavy things...including big stuffed animal dinosaurs!

programme.title: A Basket of Blueberries
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying! Unaware that Strawberry has promised Blueberry she'll take care of Huck at the ball, and feeling sorry for their friend, Lemon and Raspberry independently decide to dress up like Blueberry and fill in for her—neither knowing that the other is also doing so!

programme.title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. “I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!” says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed. To mark the occasion, and to honor all that Berrykin Bloom has done for Berry Bitty City, she decrees that they will have a Berrykin Bloom day, and there will be a ceremony in his honor. Berrykin Bloom is very humble about the whole thing, but the girls wish there was something special they could do to help honor him on his big day.

programme.title: Food that make you Pucker
programme.desc: In this sour half-hour, Avery and Chef Winlai Wong make Pork Pot Stickers with a sour vinegar sauce. Lily follows a cucumber's journey to becoming a sour pickle at a pickle factory. In the kitchen, Matt challenges them to make fruity ice pops with serious pucker power.

programme.title: Foods that make you Smile
programme.desc: Some foods just put a smile on your face! For Avery, it's mini carrot cupcakes with Chef Morag Cleevely. Lily is all smiles while visiting a chocolate maker. Then it's cooking time with Matt, where they make 3 kinds of delicious fries that are actually good for you!

programme.title: Sid's Amazing Invention!
programme.desc: Sid learns his invention is actually a simple machine called a lever, which is not only useful for launching toys, but can also help lift up really heavy things.

programme.title: The Tree House
programme.desc: After investigating at school, Sid discovers that a pulley is the perfect simple machine to help lift heavy things up to high places, like a tree house!

programme.title: Steps Of Faith

Faith is mocked by her family since she doesn't have a rapport with children or animals and is not a devout Christian. Faith decides to follow her heart and move after she encounters several challenges. She finds herself at the farm in the horse stalls shoveling manure. Faith cracks under pressure and leaves after a child is almost injured questioning whether she heard God's voice or not.

programme.sub-title: Hat Trick // Dancing on the Ice
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Going Golfing // Case of the Stolen Spectacles

Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Up in the Air // AdDRESSing the Problem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.
